scenarios.goal: fix bug where checkout redirects to the wrong page
scenarios.reason: Concrete wrong behavior with expected behavior should use the bug-fix loop.

scenarios.goal: fix failing CI typecheck job
scenarios.reason: A named failing CI check should use the failing-CI repair loop.

scenarios.goal: update stale README installation docs
scenarios.reason: Stale documentation with commands to verify should use the docs sweep loop.

scenarios.goal: address blocking pull request review comments
scenarios.reason: Blocking review feedback should use the review repair loop.

scenarios.goal: publish npm package after final release checks
scenarios.reason: Publishing and release checks should use the release readiness loop.

scenarios.goal: verify fresh setup from README in a clean directory
scenarios.reason: Clean install verification should use the fresh setup loop.

scenarios.goal: add regression tests for an uncovered checkout edge case
scenarios.reason: Missing focused coverage should use the test coverage gap loop.

scenarios.goal: make onboarding flow easier to understand on mobile
scenarios.reason: A confusing user flow should use the UX polish loop.

scenarios.goal: measure and improve slow dashboard load time
scenarios.reason: Measured speed work should use the performance loop.

scenarios.goal: upgrade React dependency and fix compatibility issues
scenarios.reason: Scoped dependency migration should use the dependency upgrade loop.

scenarios.goal: sanitize unsafe user input before saving it
scenarios.reason: A concrete input validation risk should use the security hardening loop.

scenarios.goal: refactor checkout module without changing behavior
scenarios.reason: Behavior-preserving structural work should use the refactor containment loop.

scenarios.goal: evaluate Loop It recommendation quality across realistic scenarios
scenarios.reason: Scenario-based quality assessment should use the product evaluation loop.

scenarios.goal: improve Loop It skill routing and examples
scenarios.reason: Skill instructions and routing metadata should use the skill hardening loop.

scenarios.goal: fix the page copy and mobile layout for Loop It onboarding
scenarios.reason: One confusing user-facing flow should route to UX polish, not skill instruction hardening.

scenarios.goal: improve the loop library selector scenarios and misroute examples
scenarios.reason: Selector scenarios and routing examples are skill/library behavior.

scenarios.goal: audit product quality scenarios for the loop recommendation flow
scenarios.reason: Scenario-based product quality work should use product evaluation.

scenarios.goal: upgrade vulnerable dependency and prove compatibility
scenarios.reason: A dependency upgrade with compatibility proof should route to dependency upgrade, even with vulnerability language.

scenarios.goal: security review finding for auth bypass
scenarios.reason: A concrete auth bypass finding should route to security hardening.

scenarios.goal: update stale README installation docs after npx command changed
scenarios.reason: Stale docs that need command verification should route to docs sweep.

scenarios.goal: new user cannot run npx install from a clean project
scenarios.reason: First-run install failure from a clean environment should route to fresh setup.

scenarios.goal: refactor selector scoring without changing recommendations
scenarios.reason: Behavior-preserving selector cleanup should route to refactor containment.

scenarios.goal: add regression coverage for library misroute behavior
scenarios.reason: A missing regression test around routing behavior should route to test coverage gap.

scenarios.goal: prepare npm package release after loop library updates
scenarios.reason: Final package verification after library changes should route to release readiness.

scenarios.goal: inspect this repo and run the right loop
scenarios.reason: Broad repo inspection should route to the intake loop before selecting the concrete execution loop.

scenarios.goal: find the next actionable issue in this codebase
scenarios.reason: A broad next-issue request should use codebase intake rather than guessing a specific fix loop.

scenarios.goal: what should Loop It tackle next in this repo
scenarios.reason: Asking what to tackle next needs repository intake and loop selection.
